steps: Follow the general HuProt microarray protocol. General HuProt microarray protocol [Nicole Lee] by Nicole Lee Protocol-specific parameters: For Steps 1, 19, and 21 , the secondary antibodies are: AlexaFluor 647-cinjugated AffiniPure F(ab')2 Fragment Goat-Antihuman IgG (Catalog number: 109-606-098) Alexa Fluor® 647 AffiniPure™ F(ab)₂ Fragment Goat Anti-Human IgG, Fcγ fragment specific Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #109-606-098 Cy3-conjugated AffiniPure Goat-Antihuman Serum IgA (Catalog number: 109-165-011) Cy™3 AffiniPure™ Goat Anti-Human Serum IgA, α chain specific Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #109-165-011 For Steps 2 and 4 , the sample is 1 mL CSF NOTE for Step 9 , Never allow HuProt microarray slides to dry out during this protocol until drying step.
